title: Fix C++ compile errors when passing class refs as task arg
body:
1. Fixes passing a null reference as a task argument. Before this patch it would cause a C++ compile error like `cannot convert ‘VlNull’ to ‘VlClassRef<...>’`.

2. Fixes passing a class reference as a task argument when the argument is a reference to a base class. Before the patch it would cause a C++ compile error like `cannot convert ‘VlClassRef<{DERIVED_CLASS}>’ to ‘VlClassRef<{BASE_CLASS}>`.
